top.name: Delay Rune
top.rules_text: Prepare on tile: spell targeting this tile is delayed 1 turn. Caster still pays costs.

channel.name: Delay Rune (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Delayed spells cost caster 1 extra mana when they resolve

bottom.name: Slow Field
bottom.rules_text: Imbue tile and adjacents with Temporal Drag: enemies have half movement and spells cost +1.

channel.name: Slow Field (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Also prevents Reaction casting in the field
